name: the write-time hook blocks a write that introduces a P0 violation and surfaces it to the model
command:
printf 'spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf '{"tool_input":{"file_path":"%s/pod.yaml"}}' "$PWD" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-on-save.sh"
